macro_markets.query: What are the most important macroeconomic and stock market news and developments from the past 24 hours? Include major index movements, Fed/central bank news, and significant company earnings or announcements.

items.title: US Stock Markets Rally Sharply on US-Iran Talks News
items.summary: The S&P 500 closed up 1.15% at 6,581, Dow up 1.38% at 46,208, and Nasdaq up 1.38% at 21,946, rebounding after intersecting the 200-day moving average amid reports of productive US-Iran talks easing tensions.[1][2]

items.title: European and Asian Markets Open Higher
items.summary: DAX closed up 1.22% at 22,653; Asian indices opened strong with Nikkei up 1.68%, Korea Composite up 4.30%, Hang Seng up 1.55%, Shanghai up 0.95%.[2]

items.title: S&P 500 Tests Key Resistance at 6620 Amid Support Zone
items.summary: S&P 500 charted upside gap at open between 6500-6575 as support, testing short-term resistance at 6620 within declining trend channel; RSI signals near-term downside exhaustion.[1]

items.title: Gold Prices Drop Sharply Despite Geopolitical Tensions
items.summary: Gold fell 15% to $4,482 last Friday amid simultaneous equity sell-off, likely due to hedge fund margin calls selling winners like gold to cover losses.[4]

crypto_news.query: What are the most significant cryptocurrency and blockchain news from the past 24 hours? Include major price movements, regulatory news, and notable project developments.

items.title: Crypto Market Surges as SEC Proposes Major Regulatory Shift
items.summary: Bitcoin rose 3.92% to $70,734 and Ethereum climbed 4.17% to $2,143 amid an SEC regulatory shift and strong AI sector gains, with Bittensor (TAO) up 12.19% and FET up 10.35%. Acurx Pharmaceuticals bought $2 million in Bitcoin for treasury hedging, and TeraWulf's carbon-zero BTC reserves exceeded 3,000.

items.title: Blockchain Capital Pledges 6,400 ETH Worth $13.82 Million After Two-Year Hiatus
items.summary: Blockchain Capital staked 6,400 ETH valued at approximately $13.82 million, marking its return after a two-year pause, as monitored by Lookonchain.

items.title: Scammers Seize Control of FBI-Seized Samourai Wallet Domain to Steal Bitcoin
items.summary: The domain of privacy-focused Bitcoin wallet Samourai, previously seized by the FBI, is now controlled by scammers using it to steal Bitcoin.

items.title: Nasdaq and Talos Partner on Tokenized Collateral Management
items.summary: Nasdaq integrated Talos' digital asset infrastructure with its Calypso and Trade Surveillance platforms to enable unified market access, cross-asset risk management, and compliance for tokenized collateral.

items.title: CLARITY Act Set for Committee Vote in April Amid Crypto Market Declines
items.summary: The CLARITY Act is scheduled for a committee vote in April, while crypto markets declined due to Iran war tensions, rising oil prices, and a hawkish Fed; active Ethereum addresses surged 121%.

ai_news.query: What are the most important artificial intelligence and machine learning news and developments from the past 24 hours? Include new model releases, company announcements, research breakthroughs, and industry trends.

items.title: Oracle Launches AI Customer Excellence Centre in Sydney
items.summary: Oracle announced the launch of its AI Customer Excellence Centre on March 24, 2026, to drive innovation across Australia and Oceania using Oracle Cloud Infrastructure for agentic AI, AI-powered analytics, generative AI, and machine learning.

items.title: MIT Develops Framework for 'Humble' AI in Medical Diagnoses
items.summary: An MIT-led team created a framework for AI systems that reveal uncertainty in medical diagnoses, encouraging clinicians to seek more information and reducing overconfidence risks.

items.title: Verily Raises $300M and Google Advances Fitbit Record Linkage
items.summary: Verily secured a $300 million funding round, while Google improved Fitbit record linkage, as highlighted in the March 23, 2026 AI in healthcare update.

items.title: GAI Insights Releases Daily AI News Update for March 24
items.summary: GAI Insights delivered its daily AI news briefing on March 24, 2026, covering generative AI, deep learning, large language models, and technological breakthroughs.

items.title: AI Agents Market Projected to Transform Enterprise Productivity by 2026
items.summary: The AI agents market is expanding rapidly due to advancements in machine learning, NLP, deep learning, and multimodal AI, driven by enterprise adoption and investments in generative AI.

gaming.query: What are the most notable video game and gaming industry news from the past 24 hours? Include game releases, announcements, esports, and industry developments.

items.title: Xbox Partner Preview March 2026 Announced with Game Pass Updates and Potential Halo Reveal
items.summary: Microsoft has officially announced the Xbox Partner Preview for Thursday, featuring new third-party game reveals, Game Pass additions, and speculation around Halo developments involving Halo Studios and co-developer Abstraction.

items.title: Ubisoft Fires 40 from Toronto Studio, Announces Assassin's Creed Black Flag Resynced
items.summary: Ubisoft laid off 40 workers from its Toronto studio, impacting the Splinter Cell Remake team, while new franchise head Jean Gudeson confirmed Assassin's Creed Black Flag Resynced and updates for AC Shadows and AC Unity.

items.title: Amazon Gaming Cuts Ties with Maverick Games After Four Years
items.summary: Amazon Gaming continued layoffs by ending its partnership with Maverick Games, a studio from Forza Horizon veterans, as they seek a new publisher to continue development.

items.title: Konami Reveals Marvel MaXimum Collection Releasing March 27
items.summary: Konami and Limited Run Games announced the Marvel MaXimum Collection for PC, Switch, PS5, and Xbox Series, featuring six licensed games including X-Men Arcade and Maximum Carnage.

items.title: Jeff Kaplan Announces The Legend of California, New Multiplayer Survival FPS
items.summary: Former Overwatch director Jeff Kaplan revealed his studio's new game, The Legend of California, a multiplayer survival FPS set in Gold Rush California, while criticizing Activision's practices.

items.title: Silent Hill 2 Remake Sells 5 Million Copies
items.summary: Konami reported that the Silent Hill 2 Remake has now sold 5 million copies, up from 2.5 million in October 2025 before its Xbox launch.

items.title: EA Lays Off Skate 4 Team Members at Full Circle
items.summary: EA and skate. developer Full Circle announced layoffs affecting some members of the Skate 4 team.

items.title: This Week's Game Releases: Life is Strange Reunion, DAMON and BABY, and More
items.summary: Key releases include Farming Simulator 25: Vredo Pack on March 24, DAMON and BABY on March 25, and a major wave on March 26 with Life is Strange: Reunion, Screamer, plus Switch 2 ports of Super Mario Bros. Wonder and Virtua Fighter 5 R.E.V.O.

items.title: KT Racing Announces Devstream for Test Drive Unlimited Solar Crown on March 24
items.summary: KT Racing will host a Devstream on March 24 at 4:30 PM on NACON Racing's YouTube channel to discuss Test Drive Unlimited Solar Crown.

items.title: Screen Australia Funds 26 New Game Projects with $1.4 Million
items.summary: Screen Australia announced support for 26 new video game projects through a $1.4 million investment across its funds.

tech_news.query: What are the most important technology news and developments from the past 24 hours? Include major product launches, company news, and significant tech industry developments. Exclude AI-specific news.

items.title: Apple Announces WWDC 2026 Dates for June 8-12
items.summary: Apple has officially announced its Worldwide Developers Conference (WWDC) 2026, scheduled from June 8 to June 12, with expectations for major software updates like iOS 27 across iPhones, iPads, and Macs.

items.title: Tech Stocks Rally as Traders Rotate Back into Sector
items.summary: Technology company shares rose amid trader rotation back into the sector, with notable gains in Synopsys after Elliott Management's multibillion-dollar stake and recovery in Super Micro Computer shares.

items.title: Broadcasters Push for EU Gatekeeper Status on Big Tech Smart TVs and Assistants
items.summary: Major broadcasters urged the EU to designate Google, Amazon, Apple, and Samsung's smart TVs and virtual assistants as gatekeepers under the Digital Markets Act due to rising market shares like Android TV at 23%.

items.title: NTT DATA Named Leader in IT Sustainability Services by Forrester
items.summary: NTT DATA was recognized as a Leader in The Forrester Wave™: IT Sustainability Services, Q1 2026, praised for its green software focus and innovation roadmap in sustainable IT practices.
